narrative:
Richland Township has 1,369 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
